description: This file defines the NoteEditorScreen widget, a Flutter UI component that facilitates editing and creating notes within the application. It manages user input, interacts with the application state for persistence, and handles navigation.

classes.name: NoteEditorScreen
classes.description: A StatefulWidget that provides an interface to create or edit a note.

classes.name: _NoteEditorScreenState
classes.description: The state class managing the UI and logic for NoteEditorScreen, including text controllers, save operation, and navigation control.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes the state, populating text controllers if editing an existing note.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the text controllers to free resources.

methods.name: _parseTags
methods.description: Parses a comma-separated string into a sorted list of tags.

methods.name: _save
methods.description: Handles saving the note; creates or updates note via app state and manages UI state flags.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree, including the form fields and save button, handling post-save navigation.
